title: Arcade Games - Cosmic Pinball Space Themed Tabletop Action and reflex Game Kids Boys Girls Toy Kids 5+
features: ENDLESS COSMIC ADVENTURES: Take off on a cosmic journey with this two-in-one pinball game set. Featuring two unique game boards with captivating space designs, the possibilities are endless.
FAST-PACED FUN: Challenge your reflexes in a fast-paced game that will keep the whole family entertained for hours. Cosmic Pinball is an exhilarating experience that hones hand-eye coordination.
NO BATTERIES REQUIRED: Say goodbye to battery hassle! Cosmic Pinball operates on pure spring-loaded power and manual levers. Ready for action whenever you are.
TABLETOP ENTERTAINMENT: The Cosmic Pinball Game is designed for tabletop play, making it a perfect addition to family game nights or a must-have for playdates and parties.
PERFECT GIFT: Searching for a standout gift for a special occasion? Look no further! Cosmic Pinball makes an ideal present for birthdays, holidays, or just to put a smile on a child's face.
PARTIAL ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Assembly is a breeze, and our clear instructions will have you up and running in no time. No need to be a DIY expert - just excitement and fun!
DIMENSIONS: Compact and portable, Measures 38cm in length, 24.2cm in width, and 4cm in height, making it easy to set up and store when not in use.
AGES 5 AND UP: This space-themed pinball game is tailored for kids aged 5 and up, ensuring safe and exciting gameplay for young astronauts in training.
description: Product description Unleash intergalactic fun with the Cosmic Pinball Game, a thrilling space-themed tabletop adventure that will captivate kids and adults alike! No batteries needed - just the power of imagination and skill.Fantastic way to bond, compete, and explore the universe with friends and family. Get ready for endless space-themed adventures that inspire creativity and enhance hand-eye coordination. Grab yours today and let the journey begin! Safety Warning Not suitable for childer under 36 Months, Small Part. Small Balls Chocking Hazard.
